questionTextSource: What should be noted when using the prop stand?
explanationSource:
If the side stand is still folded out and you engage a gear, the side stand switch will automatically switch off the engine. The side stand switch is a safety measure that prevents you from riding off with the side stand folded out.
The side stand is designed for parking a motorbike. Try to avoid slopes when parking. Always make sure that your motorbike is stable and that the side stand is fully extended to avoid danger and damage.
answerASource: Where possible, the motorbike should not be parked on a slope
answerBSource: The prop stand should be fully extended
answerCSource: The prop stand switch can prevent you driving off with the prop stand extended
questionTextTarget: Tayanchdan foydalanganda nimaga e’tibor berish kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar yon tayanch hali ochiq bo‘lsa va uzatma ulansa, yon tayanch kaliti dvigatelni avtomatik o‘chiradi. Bu ochiq tayanch bilan yurib ketishning oldini oluvchi xavfsizlik chorasi. Yon tayanch mototsiklni parkovka qilish uchun mo‘ljallangan. Imkon qadar qiyaliklardan saqlaning, mototsikl barqaror turganiga va tayanch to‘liq ochilganiga ishonch hosil qiling.
answerATarget: Imkon bo‘lsa, mototsikl qiyalikda parkovka qilinmasligi kerak
answerCTarget: Tayanch kaliti ochiq tayanch bilan yurib ketishning oldini olishi mumkin

questionTextSource: How must you safeguard your vehicle against theft?
explanationSource: To secure the car against theft, you must first close all the windows and doors. The ignition key must be removed in any case. Snap the steering wheel lock into place to additionally secure the car.
answerASource: By removing the ignition key, engaging the steering wheel lock and closing the windows
answerBSource: By locking the doors and boot
answerCSource: By activating the differential lock
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizni o‘g‘irlikdan qanday himoya qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomobilni o‘g‘irlikdan himoya qilish uchun avvalo barcha oynalar va eshiklarni yoping. Kontakt kalitini albatta olib qo‘yish kerak. Qo‘shimcha himoya uchun rul qulfini ham qulflang.
answerATarget: Kontakt kalitini olib qo‘yish, rul qulfini ulash va oynalarni yopish orqali

questionTextSource: What must you do when leaving your car?
explanationSource: Before leaving the vehicle, you have to protect it against rolling away uncontrolled, for example on a downhill slope. Before exiting you have to make sure not to endanger other road users. This also applies to your passengers. Opening doors carelessly when getting out is a common cause of accidents. The vehicle must also be protected against unauthorized use.
answerASource: Before opening the door, look out for traffic behind
answerBSource: Secure the vehicle against rolling away
answerCSource: Secure the vehicle against unauthorized use
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizdan chiqayotganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Transport vositasini tark etishdan oldin, masalan pastlikda, nazoratsiz yurib ketishdan himoyalang. Chiqishdan oldin boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmasligingizga ishonch hosil qiling. Bu yo‘lovchilarga ham tegishli. Eshiklarni ehtiyotsiz ochish ko‘p avariyalarga sabab bo‘ladi. Transport vositasini ruxsatsiz foydalanishdan ham himoyalash kerak.
answerATarget: Eshikni ochishdan oldin ortdagi harakatga e’tibor berish

questionTextSource: Your car is standing on the edge of the roadway. What should you do when getting into the car?
explanationSource: When entering and exiting, you must take care not to endanger the other road users. The entry from the right - from the sidewalk - is safer, but not without any danger. Before you open the doors, make sure that the traffic situation permits that. Make sure that there are no pedestrians or cyclists on the sidewalk at this time.
answerASource: Let passengers get into the car, if possible, from the pavement
answerBSource: Open the doors on the roadway side only when traffic permits
answerCSource: The doors on the right-hand side can always be opened without danger
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingiz qatnov qismi chetida turibdi. Avtomobilga o‘tirayotganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: O‘tirish va tushishda boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmaslik kerak. O‘ng tomondan, piyodalar yo‘lagidan kirish xavfsizroq, lekin butunlay xavfsiz emas. Eshiklarni ochishdan oldin harakat vaziyati bunga imkon berishiga ishonch hosil qiling. Shu payt piyodalar yo‘lagida piyoda yoki velosipedchi yo‘qligini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Yo‘lovchilar imkon bo‘lsa avtomobilga piyodalar yo‘lagi tomondan o‘tirsin
answerBTarget: Qatnov qismi tomonidagi eshiklarni faqat harakat bunga imkon berganda ochish
answerCTarget: O‘ng tomondagi eshiklarni har doim xavfsiz ochish mumkin

questionTextSource: What is important when children are getting in and out of a car?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you should make sure that children get on and off directly on the sidewalk. If the situation does not allow this, they should only get in or out on the side of the road under the supervision of an adult. Children are seen worse and are unpredictable in their behavior.
answerASource: Let the children in or out, if possible, on the pavement side
answerBSource: Let the children in or out on the roadway side only under supervision
answerCSource: Children are not allowed to get in or out of a car on public roads
questionTextTarget: Bolalar avtomobilga chiqayotganda va undan tushayotganda nima muhim?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi sifatida bolalar bevosita piyodalar yo‘lagi tomondan chiqishi va tushishiga e’tibor bering. Agar buning imkoni bo‘lmasa, ular qatnov qismi tomondan faqat kattalar nazorati ostida chiqishi yoki tushishi kerak. Bolalar yomonroq ko‘rinadi va xatti-harakati oldindan aytib bo‘lmaydi.
answerATarget: Bolalarni imkon bo‘lsa piyodalar yo‘lagi tomondan chiqarish yoki tushirish
answerBTarget: Bolalarni qatnov qismi tomondan faqat nazorat ostida chiqarish yoki tushirish
answerCTarget: Bolalarga jamoat yo‘llarida avtomobilga chiqish yoki undan tushish taqiqlangan

questionTextSource: What should you call the attention of your passengers to before exiting?
explanationSource: As a car driver you must take the necessary measures to avoid accidents or traffic disruptions when passengers leave the vehicle. Point that out to passengers when they get off on a bike path. Cyclists are not required to wait on bike paths. Anyone entering or leaving the car may not endanger other road users.
answerASource: - they should heed the traffic flowing on the left-side
answerBSource: - they should heed the pedestrians walking on the right-side
answerCSource: - cyclists are required to wait on cycle paths
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lovchilar chiqishidan oldin ularning e’tiborini nimaga qaratishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lovchilar transport vositasidan tushayotganda avariya yoki harakatga xalaqit bermaslik uchun zarur choralarni ko‘rishingiz kerak. Veloyo‘lak tomondan tushayotganlar velosipedchilarga e’tibor berishi kerak. Velosipedchilar veloyo‘lakda kutishga majbur emas. Avtomobilga kirayotgan yoki undan chiqayotgan hech kim boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmasligi kerak.
answerATarget: - chap tomondan oqib kelayotgan harakatga e’tibor berishlari kerak
answerBTarget: - o‘ng tomondagi piyodalarga e’tibor berishlari kerak

questionTextSource: Why may you not exit now?
explanationSource: Anyone getting in or out of the car must behave in such a way as to avoid endangering other road users. An approaching cyclist can be seen in your left-hand side mirror, you must let him pass first.
answerASource: Because [of the cyclist]
answerBSource: Because of the motorbike
answerCSource: Because [of the pedestrian]
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tushishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Avtomobilga chiqayotgan yoki undan tushayotgan har kim boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmaydigan tarzda harakat qilishi kerak. Chap yon ko‘zguda yaqinlashayotgan velosipedchi ko‘rinmoqda, avval uni o‘tkazib yuborishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You have stopped in a parking strip and now want to exit your vehicle. What must you do in this situation?
explanationSource: Before you open the door and leave the vehicle, check in the left-hand mirror that no one is coming from behind. You must also look to your left to make sure that there are no other vehicles in your blind spot.
answerASource: - by looking in my left-hand exterior rear-view mirror before opening the door
answerBSource: - by glancing over my left shoulder before opening the door
answerCSource: - just by looking through the slightly opened door
questionTextTarget: Siz parkovka chizig‘ida to‘xtadingiz va endi transport vositangizdan tushmoqchisiz. Bu vaziyatda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Eshikni ochishdan va transport vositasidan tushishdan oldin chap tashqi ko‘zguda ortdan hech kim kelmayotganini tekshiring. Shuningdek, chap yelkangiz oshirib qarab, ko‘r nuqtada boshqa transport vositasi yo‘qligiga ishonch hosil qiling.
answerATarget: - eshikni ochishdan oldin chap tashqi ko‘zguga qarash orqali
answerBTarget: - eshikni ochishdan oldin chap yelka oshirib qarash orqali
answerCTarget: - faqat biroz ochilgan eshik orasidan qarash orqali

questionTextSource: When leaving your car, how do you secure it against unauthorised use?
explanationSource: You have to make sure that no unauthorised persons use your car. Therefore, remove the key from the starter and make sure that all windows and doors are closed.
answerASource: I lock the doors
answerBSource: I close the windows
answerCSource: I activate the child-safety lock
questionTextTarget: Avtomobildan chiqayotganda uni ruxsatsiz foydalanishdan qanday himoyalaysiz?
explanationTarget: Hech qanday ruxsatsiz shaxs avtomobilingizdan foydalanmasligiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak. Shuning uchun kontakt kalitini olib qo‘ying va barcha oynalar hamda eshiklar yopilganiga ishonch hosil qiling.

questionTextSource: You want to let a child out of your car. What should you be aware of when doing so?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you should make sure that children get on and off directly on the pavement side. If the situation does not allow this, they should only get in or out of the vehicle on the carriageway side under supervision and with prior warning of possible dangers. Children are harder to see and their behaviour is unpredictable, so you should make sure that they no longer have to cross the road.
answerASource: - exit the car on the same side as the footpath
answerBSource: - not have to cross over the carriageway
answerCSource: - be warned of possible dangers when getting out of the car
questionTextTarget: Siz bolani avtomobildan tushirmoqchisiz. Bunda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi sifatida bolalar piyodalar yo‘lagi tomondan tushishini ta’minlang. Agar buning imkoni bo‘lmasa, ular qatnov qismi tomondan faqat nazorat ostida va mumkin bo‘lgan xavflar haqida ogohlantirilgandan keyin tushishi kerak. Bolalar yomonroq ko‘rinadi va xatti-harakati oldindan aytib bo‘lmaydi; ular yo‘lni kesib o‘tishiga to‘g‘ri kelmasligini ta’minlang.
answerBTarget: - qatnov qismini kesib o‘tishga majbur bo‘lmasligi
answerCTarget: - tushishda mumkin bo‘lgan xavflar haqida ogohlantirilishi

questionTextSource: What is allowed when your motorcycle has broken down with engine damage?
explanationSource: You cannot tow a broken motorcycle, it will tip over and fall. Instead you should either push it or transport it.
answerASource: Loading the motorcycle on a vehicle and having it transported
answerBSource: Pushing the motorcycle to the nearest garage
answerCSource: Having the motorcycle towed
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingiz dvigatel nosozligi sabab buzilib qolgan bo‘lsa, nimaga ruxsat beriladi?
explanationTarget: Buzilgan mototsiklni shatakka olish mumkin emas, u ag‘darilib ketishi mumkin. Uning o‘rniga uni itarish yoki transport vositasiga yuklab tashish kerak.

questionTextSource: You are outside of a built-up area and have come to a stop due to a fault with your motorcycle. How should it be transported to the garage?
explanationSource:
The operation of a vehicle that is no longer traffic -proof is a significant and, above all, incalculable danger for you and for other road users. Therefore, you have to pull your vehicle out of traffic in the shortest way. You can have your strength bike removed on a suitable trailer or van.
According to § 15a (4) StVO, motorcycles must not be towed with a tow rope.
answerASource: On a suitable trailer
answerBSource: In a suitable van
answerCSource: By using a suitable towrope
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olishda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olish faqat avariya yoki nosozlik kabi favqulodda holatlarda, eng yaqin mos joygacha ruxsat etiladi. Mototsikllarni shatakka olish mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Shatakka olish faqat favqulodda holatda ruxsat etiladi
answerCTarget: Shatakka olinganda avariya chiroqlari yoqilishi kerak

questionTextSource: You want to tow another vehicle with your car. What must you know?
explanationSource: You need to know if it is a vehicle with a gearshift, automatic transmission or an electric car. An electric car cannot be towed, it must be loaded. A vehicle with an automatic transmission can only be towed for a few kilometers in level "N" without any damage.
answerASource: You must at least have a driving permit class B
answerBSource: You must at least have a driving permit class BE
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz buzilib qolgan. Uni shatakka olishda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olish paytida tortayotgan va tortilayotgan transport vositalarining avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan bo‘lishi kerak. Shatakka olish faqat eng yaqin mos joygacha bo‘lishi kerak.
answerATarget: Ikkala transport vositasida ham avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan bo‘lishi kerak
answerBTarget: Faqat eng yaqin mos joygacha shatakka olish kerak
answerCTarget: Mototsiklni ham arqon bilan shatakka olish mumkin

questionTextSource: A car with servo brakes has broken down with engine damage. What is correct when towing the car away?
explanationSource: If possible, use a tow bar when towing a vehicle with a brake booster. Because a brake booster works only with the engine running. When the engine is off, only a weak braking effect can be achieved in this vehicle even with strong pressure on the foot brake.
answerASource: The car being towed can only achieve slight braking effect even when increased pressure is applied to the pedal
answerBSource: If possible, use a tow-bar
answerCSource: The action of the foot brake is not impaired by the engine not running
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olinayotgan transport vositasida kim o‘tirishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olinayotgan transport vositasini boshqarish va tormozlash qobiliyatiga ega shaxs boshqarishi kerak. U haydashga yaroqli bo‘lishi kerak.

questionTextSource: A car with power steering has broken down with engine damage and must be towed away. What is correct?
explanationSource: The function of the power steering depends on the engine and only works when the engine is running. If the engine and the assistive function of the power steering fail, steering is considerably more difficult and you need more power. The steering is impaired in its function.
answerASource: - is considerably heavier
answerBSource: - is locked
answerCSource: - is not impaired
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olish arqoni yoki shtangasi haqida nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olish moslamasi aniq ko‘rinadigan tarzda belgilanadi. U transport vositalariga mahkam va xavfsiz ulanadi.
answerATarget: U yaxshi ko‘rinadigan qilib belgilanishi kerak
answerCTarget: U iloji boricha uzun bo‘lishi kerak

questionTextSource: At what distance must the warning triangle be placed when a car has broken down on a road with fast-moving traffic?
explanationSource: If you are staying on a road with fast traffic with your vehicle, you must set up the warning triangle at a distance of approx. 100 m. Make the breakdown situation visible to other road users by switching on the hazard lights.
answerASource: At a distance of around 100 m
answerBSource: At a distance of around 50 m
answerCSource: At a distance of around 10 m
questionTextTarget: Qaysi transport vositalarini shatakka olish mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Mototsikllar va boshqarish yoki tormozlash qobiliyati buzilgan transport vositalarini odatda shatakka olish mumkin emas. Ularni yuklab tashish kerak.

questionTextSource: At night, how must you secure a vehicle which has broken down at a place where it constitutes a danger to other traffic?
explanationSource: If a vehicle has a breakdown on a multi-lane roadway at a location where it cannot be detected in time as an obstacle, you as a car driver must immediately turn on the hazard lights. Afterwards, a breakdown triangle should be placed clearly visible at a sufficient distance, in fast traffic about 100 m in front of the vehicle. You do not need to switch on the reversing light.
answerASource: Immediately switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: Place a warning triangle at a sufficient distance
answerCSource: Switch on the reversing lights
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistralda buzilib qolgan transport vositasini shatakka olishda nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda shatakka olish faqat keyingi chiqishgacha ruxsat etiladi. Shundan keyin avtomagistralni tark etish kerak.
answerBTarget: Ikkala transport vositasida avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: Eng yaqin ustaxonagacha avtomagistralda davom etish mumkin

questionTextSource: When must you switch on the hazard warning lights?
explanationSource: If a car breaks down on a multi-lane roadway at a location where it cannot be recognized in time as an obstacle, the hazard light must be switched on immediately. Parking in the second row is generally prohibited. This does not change just by switching on the hazard lights. It is not allowed. When loading and unloading the hazard light must not be switched on.
answerASource: When your vehicle has broken down at a place where it cannot readily be recognized as a stationary obstruction
answerBSource: When double-parking
answerCSource: For all loading or unloading
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olishda qaysi tezlikda harakatlanish kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olayotganda juda ehtiyotkor va sekin harakatlanish kerak. Arqon yoki shtanga bo‘shashib ketmasligi va xavf tug‘dirmasligi kerak.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when towing?
explanationSource: When towing, the distance between the towing vehicle and the towed vehicle shall not exceed 5 meters. The tools used such as rod or rope are clearly marked. Motorcycles must not be towed but must be loaded.
answerASource: The distance between the vehicles must not exceed 5 m
answerBSource: Tow-rope/tow-bar must be clearly marked
answerCSource: Motorcycles may only be towed with a fixed connection
questionTextTarget: Buzilgan avtomobilni qanday xavfsizlantirasiz?
explanationTarget: Buzilgan avtomobilni avariya chiroqlari bilan, zarur bo‘lsa ogohlantirish uchburchagi bilan xavfsizlantiring. Xavfsizlik nimchasini kiying va xavfsiz joyga o‘ting.

questionTextSource: Your car suffers a flat tyre on the motorway. What should you do?
explanationSource: If your vehicle breaks down on a multi-lane road due to a flat tire in a place where it cannot be detected in time as a stationary obstacle, immediately turn on the hazard lights. After that, a breakdown triangle is to be placed in a clearly visible position at a sufficient distance. In fast traffic, the distance between the vehicle and the breakdown triangle should be approx. 100 m.
answerASource: - turn on my hazard lights and park as far to the right as possible
answerBSource: - place the warning triangle at a distance of about 100 m
answerCSource: - continue driving to the next exit
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olishda burilish ko‘rsatkichlari ishlamasa nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar burilish ko‘rsatkichlari avariya chiroqlari sabab ishlamasa, yo‘nalish o‘zgarishini qo‘l ishorasi bilan aniq ko‘rsatish kerak.

questionTextSource: You car has a fault and can no longer be driven. What must you be aware of during towing?
explanationSource: Keep in mind that without the engine working, the brake boosters of the engine brake will also fail. This means that the applied braking force is much higher than when the engine is running. If possible, always use a tow bar when towing. The towing bar prevents collision and braking forces can be transmitted.
answerASource: - the force required to operate the brake pedal is significantly greater if the engine has failed
answerBSource: - a towing bar should be used where possible
answerCSource: - the rear fog lights should also be switched on to indicate the towing procedure
questionTextTarget: Transport vositasi nosoz bo‘lsa, uni qayerga olib borish kerak?
explanationTarget: Nosoz transport vositasini faqat eng yaqin mos joygacha olib borish kerak. Shatakka olish uzoq masofali tashish o‘rnini bosmaydi.

questionTextSource: You car has a fault and can no longer be driven. What must you be aware of during towing?
explanationSource: When towing, the towing vehicle and the towed vehicle must turn on the hazard lights. The tow rope should be kept as tight as possible. If the breakdown did not occur on the freeway, it is not allowed to drive onto the freeway during towing.
answerASource: - the hazard lights must be switched on on both vehicles
answerBSource: - the towing cable should be kept as taut as possible
answerCSource: - the motorway may only be used to shorten the journey to the next car garage
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olish qachon ruxsat etiladi?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olish faqat transport vositasi nosozlik sabab o‘zi harakatlana olmasa ruxsat etiladi. Yoqilg‘i tugashi kabi oldini olish mumkin bo‘lgan holatlarda ham alohida ehtiyotkorlik talab qilinadi.
answerATarget: Nosozlik sabab transport vositasi harakatlana olmaganda

questionTextSource: You experience a breakdown outside of a built-up area. Your motor vehicle is located on the carriageway behind a bend in the road. What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: To secure the area, the car driver must turn on the hazard lights and set up a sign behind the vehicle to warn other road users. In addition, you should wear a safety vest for improved visibility.
answerASource: I have to turn on my hazard lights
answerBSource: I must at least position a conspicuous warning sign behind the vehicle
answerCSource: I should wear a high-visibility vest
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olishda qaysi hujjat kerak bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tortuvchi transport vositasini boshqaruvchi shaxs tegishli haydovchilik guvohnomasiga ega bo‘lishi kerak. Shatakka olingan transportni boshqaruvchi ham transportni xavfsiz boshqara olishi kerak.

questionTextSource: Your car has an engine fault and must be towed away with a tow rope. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: Observe the manufacturer's specifications when towing. The electronic aids fail, so be prepared for sluggish steering.
answerASource: A malfunctioning car with assisted steering is difficult to steer
answerBSource: When towing an electric vehicle, it is necessary to following the manufacturer’s guidelines
answerCSource: Driving licence class BE is the minimum required in order to tow a car
questionTextTarget: Buzilgan transport vositasi avtomagistralda turib qolsa nima qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Avariya chiroqlarini yoqing, xavfsizlik nimchasini kiying, transport vositasini iloji boricha yo‘l chetiga oling, ogohlantirish uchburchagini qo‘ying va xavfsiz joyda kuting.

questionTextSource: You experience a breakdown outside of a built-up area. Your car is situated on the carriageway, behind a bend in the road. Which is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: Before you leave the vehicle, you must switch on the hazard warning lights and put on a high-visibility waistcoat. This way, other road users can recognise you and react to you. Out of town, a warning triangle must be placed at a distance of 100 m from the vehicle.
answerASource: I have to switch on my hazard lights
answerBSource: I have to place at least one well-visible warning sign about 100 m behind the vehicle
answerCSource: I should wear a hi-vis vest
questionTextTarget: Shatakka olish arqoni qanday belgilanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Shatakka olish arqoni boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari uni ko‘rishi uchun aniq belgilanishi kerak. Bu to‘qnashuvlarning oldini oladi.
answerBTarget: Qizil bayroq yoki mos belgi bilan

questionTextSource: You have to change a tyre on the hard shoulder of the motorway. What safeguard is necessary?
explanationSource: Since you is you on the highway, be driven on the very high speeds, you should change a tire, place the warning triangle in about 100 m distance clearly visible on the right edge of the roadway. All activities carry a warning vest and place a warning light at a sufficient distance.
answerASource: I have to set up the warning triangle in a well-visible position at a distance of 100 m on the edge of the right-hand lane
answerBSource: I have to set up the warning light at an adequate distance
answerCSource: I should wear a high-visibility vest at all times
questionTextTarget: Avtobus buzilib qolsa yo‘lovchilar xavfsizligi uchun nima qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lovchilarni xavfsiz joyga olib chiqing, qatnov qismidan uzoqda saqlang va transport vositasini tegishli ravishda xavfsizlantiring.

questionTextSource: Where is it permitted to flash headlights to indicate your intention to overtake?
explanationSource: Outside built-up areas, you as a car driver may use the flashlight to signal your intention to overtake. This is allowed during the day and in the dark. Within built-up areas the flash light may not be used.
answerASource: In daylight outside built-up areas
answerBSource: In darkness outside built-up areas
answerCSource: In darkness in built-up areas
questionTextTarget: Qachon ogohlantiruvchi signal berishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ogohlantiruvchi signal faqat xavf haqida ogohlantirish uchun ishlatiladi. Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida quvib o‘tish niyatini signal yoki chiroq bilan bildirish mumkin.
answerBTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida quvib o‘tishni bildirish uchun

questionTextSource: When must you switch on the hazard lights on your vehicle?
explanationSource: If your car breaks down in a blind spot, you should warn other road users with your hazard warning lights. While your car is being towed away, you must switch on the hazard warning lights.
answerASource: - experiences a breakdown at a place where the view is obscured
answerBSource: - is being towed
answerCSource: - is briefly double-parked by me
questionTextTarget: Avariya chiroqlaridan qachon foydalanish kerak?
explanationTarget: Avariya chiroqlari boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini xavf haqida ogohlantirish uchun ishlatiladi, masalan tirbandlik oxirida, buzilgan transport vositasida yoki shatakka olishda.

questionTextSource: How can you tell whether the rear fog lamp is switched on?
explanationSource: A look at the dashboard is enough and the car driver immediately recognizes from the yellow warning light that the rear fog-lamp is in operation. According to the highway traffic act, the warning light must be in direct field of vision.
answerASource: By the amber indicator light
answerBSource: By the blue indicator light
answerCSource: By the red indicator light
questionTextTarget: Qorong‘ida qaysi chiroqlar bilan haydash kerak?
explanationTarget: Qorong‘ida ko‘rish va ko‘rinish uchun qisqa faralar yoqilishi kerak. Faqat gabarit chiroqlari bilan yurish yetarli emas.

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle is fitted with a fog headlamp. What must you remember about lighting when it is foggy?
explanationSource: When it is foggy, you are less visible to other people on the road. To increase your visibility you may use your headlamp instead or with dipped headlights
answerASource: The fog headlamp may be used instead of dipped headlight
answerBSource: The fog headlamp may be used with dipped headlight
answerCSource: You may drive with parking lights only
questionTextTarget: Qachon qisqa faralarni yoqishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qorong‘ida, ko‘rinish yomon bo‘lganda, tuman, yomg‘ir yoki qor yog‘ganda qisqa faralarni yoqish kerak.

questionTextSource: It is dark and the main beam fails because the bulb filament has burnt out. What must you do?
explanationSource: You need to make sure that you are both visible to other people on the road and that you are yourself able to see the road. Make sure to replace the bulb as soon as possible in the meantime immediately switch on dipped headlights.
answerASource: Immediately switch to dipped headlight
answerBSource: Replace the bulb as soon as possible
answerCSource: Proceed slowly to the nearest garage using parking lights
questionTextTarget: Qachon uzoqni yorituvchi faralardan foydalanish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Uzoqni yorituvchi faralar faqat boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ko‘r qilmasa ishlatilishi mumkin. Qarshidan transport kelganda yoki oldinda transport bo‘lsa, ularni o‘chiring.

questionTextSource: Visibility is considerably reduced. When are you allowed to switch on fog headlamps?
explanationSource: If the visibility during the day is badly affected by fog, snowfall or rain, then you, as a car driver, have to switch on to low beam. Only in weather conditions with strong visual impairment you may also turn on the fog lights.
answerASource: In rain
answerBSource: In falling snow
answerCSource: In fog
questionTextTarget: Tuman faralarini qachon yoqish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tuman faralari tuman, qor yoki kuchli yomg‘ir sabab ko‘rinish sezilarli yomonlashganda ishlatiladi.

questionTextSource: You are driving at night on an unlit road. There is a motor vehicle travelling a short distance in front of you. Which lights must you have on?
explanationSource: The car driver must turn on the low beam on his own vehicle in order not to blind vehicles driving in front of you nor oncoming traffic. Using high beam is out of the question, as it would dazzle the other driver.
answerASource: Dipped headlights
answerBSource: Full beam
answerCSource: Only side lights
questionTextTarget: Orqa tuman chirog‘ini qachon yoqish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Orqa tuman chirog‘i faqat tuman sabab ko‘rinish 50 m dan kam bo‘lganda yoqilishi mumkin. Bunda maksimal tezlik 50 km/soat.

questionTextSource: The rear lighting systems of your car are covered. What has to be done?
explanationSource: You must always attach a light carrier with all the rear lights to your vehicle. Keep in mind that you as a car driver are responsible for the effectiveness of the lighting equipment. A kilometer limit does not exist in this situation.
answerASource: - must be attached in any case
answerBSource: - need only be attached for journeys at dusk or during the hours of darkness
answerCSource: - need only be attached on journeys longer than 5 km
questionTextTarget: Ko‘r qiluvchi chiroqlarda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan transport ko‘r qilsa, yo‘lning o‘ng chetiga qarang, tezlikni kamaytiring va kerak bo‘lsa to‘xtashga tayyor turing.

questionTextSource: Depending on the motor vehicle, how can you tell if the main beam is switched on?
explanationSource: The blue indicator with the headlight symbol indicates that the high beam is on. In addition, you can recognize the position of the switch by touching it whether the main beam is turned on or not. The green warning light does not represent high beam, but low beam.
answerASource: - position of the control switch
answerBSource: - blue indicator light
answerCSource: - green indicator light
questionTextTarget: Qaysi chiroqlar transport vositasini ko‘rinadigan qiladi?
explanationTarget: Gabarit va orqa chiroqlar transport vositasini qorong‘ida ko‘rinadigan qiladi. Qisqa faralar esa yo‘lni yoritadi va sizni boshqalarga ko‘rsatadi.

questionTextSource: As a basic rule, what lights of a motor vehicle must be turned on when driving in darkness?
explanationSource: In Germany it is compulsory to switch on the dipped headlights in the dark. When the low beam is switched on, you see more and you are also seen better.
answerASource: The dipped headlight
answerBSource: Only the parking light
answerCSource: The driving beam
questionTextTarget: Yoritish moslamalari haqida nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Chiroqlar ishlashi, toza bo‘lishi va to‘g‘ri sozlangan bo‘lishi kerak. Noto‘g‘ri sozlangan faralar boshqalarni ko‘r qilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: How can you tell that your main beam lights are switched on?
explanationSource: The blue control light indicates that the high beam is switched on.
answerASource: - blue indicator lamp
answerBSource: - green indicator lamp
answerCSource: - red indicator lamp
questionTextTarget: Chiroqlar iflos bo‘lsa qanday oqibat bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Iflos chiroqlar yoritishni kamaytiradi va transport vositangiz boshqalarga yomonroq ko‘rinadi. Bu avariya xavfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: When are you allowed to use fog headlamps also during the day?
explanationSource: In the event of heavy weather-related visibility restriction due to fog, snow or rain, fog lights may be switched on during the day. These strong weather-related restrictions of visibility usually only occur in autumn and winter months. You are generally not allowed to drive with ice on the windscreen. You need to remove it before starting your journey.
answerASource: - by fog or falling snow
answerBSource: - by rain
answerCSource: - by ice on the windscreen
questionTextTarget: Qisqa faralar qarshidan kelayotganlarni nega ko‘r qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Faralar juda baland sozlangan bo‘lsa, lampalar noto‘g‘ri o‘rnatilgan bo‘lsa yoki transport vositasi ortiqcha/yomon yuklangan bo‘lsa, qisqa faralar ham boshqalarni ko‘r qilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When are you allowed to switch on rear fog lamps?
explanationSource: The rear fog-lamps of your vehicle may only be used if the visibility is less than 50 m in heavy fog. Due to the high risk of glare, the lights can otherwise become a security risk for subsequent traffic.
answerASource: When fog reduces visibility to less than 50 m
answerBSource: When fog reduces visibility to 100 m
answerCSource: When visibility is reduced by heavy rain
questionTextTarget: Qisqa faralar bilan ko‘r qilishning oldini qanday olish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk holatiga qarab fara balandligini sozlang. Ta’mirdan keyin faralar sozlamasini tekshirtiring va faqat ruxsat etilgan lampalardan foydalaning.

questionTextSource: Where is it sufficient to use your parking lights while your car is parked on an unlit roadway?
explanationSource: Cars may only be parked on unlit roads with parking lights switched on within built-up areas. Because within built-up areas, people drive at lower speeds, so that the parked car can be detected in time. Outside built-up areas this is not permitted.
answerASource: In built-up areas
answerBSource: Outside built-up areas
answerCSource: On the hard shoulder of autobahns
questionTextTarget: Qachon kunduzgi chiroqlar yetarli emas?
explanationTarget: Qorong‘ida yoki ko‘rinish yomon bo‘lganda kunduzgi chiroqlar yetarli emas, chunki orqa chiroqlar ko‘pincha yonmaydi. Qisqa faralarni yoqing.

questionTextSource: When you are driving, how can you tell whether the headlights are switched on full beam?
explanationSource: Usually there is a blue indicator light in the area of ​​the speedometer which indicates the function of the high beam. If this blue light is turned on, the main beam of your vehicle is switched on as well.
answerASource: By a blue indicator light
answerBSource: By a red indicator light
answerCSource: By a green indicator light
questionTextTarget: Qaysi holatda yoritish moslamalarini tozalash kerak?
explanationTarget: Loy, qor yoki muz chiroqlarni to‘sib qo‘ysa, ularni tozalash kerak. Aks holda ko‘rinish va ko‘rinarli bo‘lish kamayadi.
answerBTarget: Qor yoki muz bilan yopilgan bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: Which dangers can arise from a manual light range adjustment being incorrectly set?
explanationSource: The headlamp beam height control is there to adjust the orientation of the headlamps to the load of the vehicle. If set incorrectly, they are either set too low - the visibility is too low - or too high. If they are set too high, it blinds oncoming traffic. The head lamps themselves are therefore not enough.
answerASource: Oncoming traffic may be dazzled
answerBSource: Visibility may be too low
answerCSource: Headlamps may fail
questionTextTarget: Yuk transport vositasining yoritishiga qanday ta’sir qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Og‘ir yuk transport vositasining orqa qismini pastlatib, faralarni yuqoriga qaratishi mumkin. Bu qarshidan kelayotganlarni ko‘r qiladi.

questionTextSource: Are you allowed to drive only with side lights (parking lights) in darkness?
explanationSource: With marker lights alone, you are not allowed to ride as a car driver under any circumstances. A synonymous designation for marker light is parking light. The name says it all: Parking light is intended exclusively for stationary, possibly parked cars.
answerASource: No
answerBSource: Yes, if you are driving in a queue outside built-up areas
answerCSource: Yes, if the roadway is sufficiently lit in built-up areas
questionTextTarget: Qachon uzoq farani o‘chirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Qarshidan transport kelganda, oldinda transport bo‘lganda yoki yoritilgan ko‘chalarda boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ko‘r qilmaslik uchun uzoq farani o‘chiring.

questionTextSource: When must you use dipped headlights also during the day?
explanationSource: If visibility is severely limited due to weather conditions - rain, fog, snowfall - you must use the prescribed lighting equipment, usually low beam, even during the daytime driving. This is necessary to be seen better by other road users and to help you see the others better.
answerASource: - by fog or falling snow
answerBSource: - by rain
answerCSource: - by a misted windscreen
questionTextTarget: Parkovka chiroqlaridan qachon foydalaniladi?
explanationTarget: Qorong‘ida yoritilmagan joyda to‘xtab turgan transport vositasini ko‘rinadigan qilish uchun parkovka chiroqlari ishlatiladi.

questionTextSource: During twilight or the hours of darkness, when must you have your side lights switched on as a minimum requirement?
explanationSource: At dusk and in the dark always drive with low beam. So, you are clearly visible and you can see well yourself. Vehicles are not allowed to only drive with parking light, because the luminosity of these lights, which are also known as the sidelights, is not sufficient.
answerASource: When the vehicle is parked on the hard shoulder outside built-up areas
answerBSource: When driving on roads with adequate continuous lighting
questionTextTarget: Qaysi chiroq tormozlashni ko‘rsatadi?
explanationTarget: Tormoz chiroqlari ortdagi harakatga tormozlayotganingizni bildiradi. Ular ishlashi juda muhim.

questionTextSource: When do you have to switch on your dipped headlights?
explanationSource: In poor visibility you must always turn on the low beam. This is always the case during dusk, in darkness or in weather-related poor visibility conditions such as rain, fog or snow. Even if you drive through a tunnel, you must always turn on the low beam.
answerASource: During twilight
answerBSource: When it is dark
answerCSource: When driving through a tunnel
questionTextTarget: Tirkama yoritishida nimani tekshirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirkamaning orqa chiroqlari, tormoz chiroqlari, burilish ko‘rsatkichlari va reflektorlari ishlashi hamda ko‘rinishi kerak.

questionTextSource: What can be the consequence of wrongly setting the headlamp levelling control?
explanationSource:
If the headlights are set too high, you will dazzle oncoming traffic. If the headlights are set too low, they will barely illuminate the road and you will not have sufficient visibility ahead.
If the headlights are set incorrectly, the lights may not turn off completely.
answerASource: The oncoming traffic may be dazzled by my dipped headlights
answerBSource: My car's headlamp range may be too short
answerCSource: The life-cycle of the light bulb for the headlights may be reduced
questionTextTarget: Transport vositasidan chiqib turgan yukni qachon belgilash kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuk orqaga yoki yon tomonga belgilangan o‘lchamdan ortiq chiqsa, uni tegishli belgilar yoki chiroqlar bilan belgilash kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the function of your vehicle’s high-beam assist during hours of darkness?
explanationSource:
The assistant switches the high beam on and off automatically so that other road users are not dazzled.
The high beam is only switched on automatically if the road is not sufficiently lit.
answerASource: - dims the high beam in good time when there is oncoming traffic
answerBSource: - activates the high beam when the ambient conditions are suitable
answerCSource: - cleans the headlamp for the high beam
questionTextTarget: Qorong‘ida chiqib turgan yuk qanday belgilanadi?
explanationTarget: Qorong‘ida chiqib turgan yuk chiroqlar va reflektorlar bilan aniq ko‘rinadigan qilib belgilanadi.

questionTextSource: In what situation might your high-beam assist be unable to dim your vehicle’s high beam in good time when encountering oncoming traffic?
explanationSource: When crossing a crest and driving through a bend, the high beam assist camera may not be able to recognise oncoming traffic in time. Switch off the high beam manually when you notice it so as not to dazzle oncoming traffic and endanger yourself.
answerASource: When driving over a summit
answerBSource: When driving around a bend in the road
answerCSource: When dazzled by an oncoming vehicle
questionTextTarget: Yuk old tomonga chiqib tursa nimaga e’tibor berish kerak?
explanationTarget: Old tomonga chiqib turgan yuk boshqa harakat ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmasligi va zarur bo‘lsa belgilanib qo‘yilishi kerak.

questionTextSource: The automatic lighting system is activated on your car. What should you anticipate when driving in the lighting conditions shown?
explanationSource: The light and visibility conditions are poor due to the low sun and foggy air. However, the automatic light system does not recognise poor light conditions. Switch on the low beam manually so that following road users can see you better.
answerASource: The low beam does not turn on automatically
answerBSource: I will only be seen very late by the road users behind me
answerCSource: The automatic lighting system will switch on my fog lights
questionTextTarget: Qachon transport vositasining yoritish moslamalari yopilib qolmasligi kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuk yoki jihozlar chiroqlar, reflektorlar yoki davlat raqamini yopib qo‘ymasligi kerak. Agar yopilsa, qo‘shimcha yoritish va belgilash kerak.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles must always be marked by their own lights or parking warning plates when parked on the roadway at dusk or in darkness in built-up areas?
explanationSource: Trucks and recreational vehicles above 3.5 t permissible gross weight and trailers can be parked in town on the road when you're recognizable with a parking warning board or its own light source. Cars do not need this light source.
answerASource: Trucks and motor caravans with a permissible total mass exceeding 3.5 t
answerBSource: Trailers
answerCSource: Cars
questionTextTarget: Qaysi vaziyatlarda faralarni to‘g‘ri sozlash ayniqsa muhim?
explanationTarget: Yuklangan transport vositasida va faralar ta’mirlangandan keyin faralarni to‘g‘ri sozlash ayniqsa muhim. Noto‘g‘ri sozlash boshqalarni ko‘r qiladi.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles must be equipped with amber reflectors on their sides?
explanationSource: To make the long side more visible, you should on tractors that run on attachment, which are longer than 6 m, attach a yellow reflector. The same applies for trailers have fixed the attached implements.
answerASource: Tractors which are longer than 6 m including any mounted implements
answerBSource: Trailers and attached working equipment
answerCSource: All multiple-track motor vehicles
questionTextTarget: Yuk tashishda orqa chiroqlar yopilib qolsa nima qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar yuk orqa chiroqlarni yopib qo‘ysa, qo‘shimcha chiroqlar va reflektorlar o‘rnatilishi kerak.

questionTextSource: You have finished working in the fields and want to drive home on public roads with your tractor. It is already dusk. What must you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Switch on the lights even though you can still see well
answerBSource: Check lights and clean when necessary
answerCSource: Switch on the work lights too so you can be seen more clearly
questionTextTarget: Qishloq xo‘jaligi transport vositalarida yoritish bo‘yicha nimaga e’tibor beriladi?
explanationTarget: Ish jihozlari chiroqlar va reflektorlarni yopib qo‘yishi yoki yon tomonga chiqib turishi mumkin. Bunday holatda qo‘shimcha belgilash talab qilinadi.

questionTextSource: You are driving with main beam lights on in darkness. When do you have to dip your headlights?
explanationSource: You must not dazzle the oncoming traffic with high beam. So, turn it off immediately if you realize that other vehicles are driving towards you. Pedestrians will not be dazzled by your high beam if they travel in the same direction as you.
answerASource: When a vehicle is oncoming
answerBSource: When a vehicle is driving close in front
answerCSource: If there are pedestrians in front moving in the same direction
questionTextTarget: Qishloq xo‘jaligi jihozi chiroqlarni yopsa nima qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar jihoz transport vositasining yoritish moslamalarini yopsa, qo‘shimcha yoritish va ogohlantirish belgilari o‘rnatilishi kerak.

questionTextSource: You are driving with main beam lights on in darkness. When do you have to dip your headlights?
explanationSource: When driving in the dark with high beam, you need to turn it off when approaching oncoming traffic. You are not allowed to drive with high beam on roads that have sufficient lighting throughout. The head lamps of waiting vehicles should not blind others. That's why you have to dip your lights at railroad crossings. If pedestrians precede in the same direction, they are not dazzled by the high beam.
answerASource: If I am driving on a road with constant, adequate lighting
answerBSource: If I am required to wait at a rail crossing and dazzling others
answerCSource: If there are pedestrians moving in the same direction in front of me
questionTextTarget: Qachon qishloq xo‘jaligi jihozini ogohlantirish panellari bilan belgilash kerak?
explanationTarget: Jihoz transport vositasidan yon tomonga sezilarli chiqib tursa yoki chiroqlar/reflektorlarni yopsa, ogohlantirish panellari bilan belgilash kerak.

questionTextSource: Why must you also drive with dipped headlight during the day when visibility is impaired by fog, rain or falling snow?
explanationSource: If visibility is poor during the day, due to weather conditions such as rain, fog or snow, you as the driver must switch on the low beam. The primary concern here is that your vehicle is better seen by other road users. The traffic signs are not better seen from a greater distance.
answerASource: So that you will be more easily seen by other road users
answerBSource: So that you can drive at a higher speed
answerCSource: So that you can see traffic signs at greater distances
questionTextTarget: Qishloq xo‘jaligi transport vositasidagi qo‘shimcha jihozlar nimaga olib kelishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha jihozlar transport vositasining kengligini va uzunligini oshirishi, burilishda chetga chiqishi va boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When are you required to drive with dipped headlights or daytime running lights?
explanationSource: For your safety and the safety of other people, you should be visible by always having either the dipped headlights or running lights on
answerASource: For every journey
answerBSource: Only when driving in built-up areas
answerCSource: Only when visibility is poor
questionTextTarget: Chiqib turgan qishloq xo‘jaligi jihozi qachon belgilanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Jihoz yon tomonga, oldinga yoki orqaga ruxsat etilgan chegaradan ko‘proq chiqib tursa, uni belgilash kerak.

questionTextSource: When must attachments have additional lighting systems?
explanationSource: That need to cover the lighting equipment of your vehicle attachments are additionally with illuminated. The same applies to the stand out by more than one meter above the reflectors out. And when the implement laterally by more than 40 cm above the Begenzungs- or tail lights of the vehicle protruding.
answerASource: - blocks the vehicle's lighting system
answerBSource: - projects more than 40 cm laterally beyond the vehicle's front and rear position lamps
answerCSource: - projects by more than 1 m beyond the vehicle's retro-reflectors
questionTextTarget: Qachon ogohlantirish panellari yoki qo‘shimcha chiroqlar kerak bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Jihoz transport vositasining yoritish moslamalarini yopsa, old va orqa gabarit chiroqlaridan 40 sm dan ortiq yon tomonga chiqsa yoki reflektorlardan 1 m dan ortiq orqaga chiqsa, qo‘shimcha belgilash kerak.
answerATarget: - transport vositasining yoritish tizimini to‘sib qo‘ysa
answerBTarget: - old va orqa gabarit chiroqlaridan yon tomonga 40 sm dan ortiq chiqsa
answerCTarget: - reflektorlardan 1 m dan ortiq orqaga chiqsa

questionTextSource: You are driving on the autobahn and there is a traffic jam. What is correct?
explanationSource: During a traffic jam, a motorcycle has to behave like a regular car. It cannot drive in between other vehicles or use the hard shoulder.
answerASource: Drive up to the queue carefully, maintaining the required safety distance
answerBSource: Proceed between the other vehicles
answerCSource: Proceed on the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistralda ketyapsiz va tirbandlik bor. Qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Tirbandlikda mototsikl oddiy avtomobil kabi harakat qilishi kerak. U boshqa transport vositalari orasidan o‘tishi yoki yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan foydalanishi mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Zarur xavfsiz masofani saqlagan holda navbat oxiriga ehtiyotkorlik bilan yaqinlashish

questionTextSource: What is allowed on autobahns?
explanationSource: On the freeway/autobahn, a motorcycle has to behave like a regular car. It can stop on the hard shoulder in case of breakdown. It cannot share a line with another vehicle and cannot leave on a farm track
answerASource: Stopping on the hard shoulder in case of a breakdown
answerBSource: Driving beside another vehicle in the same lane
answerCSource: Leaving the autobahn on a farm track
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistralda nimaga ruxsat beriladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda mototsikl oddiy avtomobil kabi harakat qilishi kerak. Nosozlik bo‘lsa yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtashi mumkin. U bitta yo‘lakda boshqa transport vositasi bilan yonma-yon yurishi yoki dala yo‘lidan chiqishi mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Nosozlik holatida yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtash
answerBTarget: Bitta yo‘lakda boshqa transport vositasi yonida yurish

questionTextSource: You are driving in the left of two lanes and approaching a vehicle that has just started to overtake. What do you do?
explanationSource: You allow this vehicle to overtake by maintaining a safety distance. As the vehicle changes from the right, be prepared that its speed is lower than yours despite acceleration. Slow your pace down, if necessary. Never tailgate, honk or flash.
answerASource: Keep an adequate distance behind the vehicle in front
answerBSource: Allow the vehicle in front to overtake
answerCSource: Close up to the vehicle in front, sound your horn and flash your lights
questionTextTarget: Siz ikki yo‘lakdan chapdagisida ketyapsiz va hozirgina quvib o‘tishni boshlagan transport vositasiga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositasiga quvib o‘tishga imkon bering va xavfsiz masofa saqlang. U o‘ngdan chapga o‘tayotgani sabab, tezlashayotgan bo‘lsa ham sizdan sekinroq bo‘lishi mumkin. Zarur bo‘lsa tezlikni kamaytiring. Hech qachon juda yaqin yurib, signal chalib yoki faralarni chaqnatmang.
answerATarget: Oldindagi transport vositasigacha yetarli masofa saqlayman
answerBTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasiga quvib o‘tishga imkon beraman
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasiga yaqinlashib, signal chalaman va faralarni chaqnataraman

questionTextSource: You are driving on the autobahn in light traffic. How long are you allowed to stay in the left-hand lane?
explanationSource: The left lane may generally only be used for the purpose of overtaking. If the preceding vehicle overtakes, it can be assumed that the following car driver will also overtake. Therefore, it is allowed here to use the left lane. In all other cases, you have to drive on the right.
answerASource: As long as is necessary to overtake other vehicles
answerBSource: As long as you are driving behind a vehicle which is overtaking in the left-hand lane
answerCSource: All the time, provided no other vehicle wants to overtake you
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistralda yengil harakatda ketyapsiz. Chap yo‘lakda qancha vaqt qolishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakdan odatda faqat quvib o‘tish uchun foydalaniladi. Agar oldindagi transport vositasi quvib o‘tayotgan bo‘lsa, ortdagi haydovchi ham quvib o‘tadi deb hisoblash mumkin. Boshqa hollarda o‘ng tomonda yurish kerak.
answerATarget: Boshqa transport vositalarini quvib o‘tish uchun zarur bo‘lgan muddatgacha
answerBTarget: Chap yo‘lakda quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasi ortidan ketayotganimcha
answerCTarget: Hech kim meni quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lmasa, doimo

questionTextSource: What applies on clearways for motor vehicles only?
explanationSource: You may only enter at intersections or T-junctions on motorways. Turning on motorways is prohibited. The regulations regarding speed differ from those that apply on the freeway. On highways you must not drive faster than the range of the low beam allows.
answerASource: No U-turns
answerBSource: Join the clearway only at crossroads and junctions
answerCSource: In darkness, you may drive faster than the range of visibility allowed by dipped headlights
questionTextTarget: Faqat motorli transport vositalari uchun mo‘ljallangan tezkor yo‘llarda nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Bunday yo‘llarga faqat chorraha yoki qo‘shilish joylaridan kirish mumkin. Qayrilib burilish taqiqlangan. Tezlik qoidalari avtomagistraldagidan farq qiladi; qorong‘ida qisqa faralar yoritadigan masofadan tez yurmaslik kerak.
answerBTarget: Tezkor yo‘lga faqat chorraha va qo‘shilish joylaridan kirish
answerCTarget: Qorong‘ida qisqa faralar ko‘rsatadigan masofadan tezroq haydash mumkin

questionTextSource: A traffic jam has formed on a three-lane autobahn. Where must the channel for emergency vehicles be formed?
explanationSource: When traffic stops on freeways or on roads outside of built-up areas with at least two lanes in one direction, vehicles must form a free lane for the passage of police and support vehicles. If a road has three lanes into one direction, then the middle is considered to be between the left and the middle lane.
answerASource: Between the left-hand and the middle lanes
answerBSource: Between the middle and right-hand lanes
answerCSource: On the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Uch yo‘lakli avtomagistralda tirbandlik yuzaga keldi. Favqulodda xizmat yo‘lagi qayerda hosil qilinishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda yoki aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida bir yo‘nalishda kamida ikki yo‘lakli yo‘lda tirbandlik bo‘lsa, politsiya va yordam transportlari uchun bo‘sh yo‘lak hosil qilinadi. Uch yo‘lakli yo‘lda u chap va o‘rta yo‘lak orasida hosil qilinadi.
answerATarget: Chap yo‘lak va o‘rta yo‘lak orasida

questionTextSource: You are driving in a merging lane. What should you do?
explanationSource: On an acceleration lane it is allowed to drive faster on the right than on the continuous lane. In order to merge, you as a car driver must accelerate adequately and observe the right of way and the safety distance.
answerASource: Drive past to the right of slower-moving vehicles driving on the through-lane and merge in before them
answerBSource: Accelerate appropriately, do not pull up if possible, merge while observing the right of way
answerCSource: Always drive to the end of the merging lane, pull up there and then enter lane
questionTextTarget: Siz qo‘shilish yo‘lagida ketyapsiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tezlanish yo‘lagida asosiy yo‘lakdagi sekinroq transport vositalaridan o‘ng tomondan tezroq yurishga ruxsat bor. Harakatga qo‘shilish uchun mos tezlaning, ustunlik va xavfsiz masofani hisobga oling.
answerATarget: Asosiy yo‘lakdagi sekin transport vositalarining o‘ng tomonidan o‘tib, ulardan oldin qo‘shilish
answerBTarget: Mos ravishda tezlashish, imkon bo‘lsa to‘xtamaslik, ustunlikka rioya qilib qo‘shilish
answerCTarget: Har doim qo‘shilish yo‘lagi oxirigacha borib, u yerda to‘xtab keyin yo‘lakka kirish

questionTextSource: What must you do now?
explanationSource: You approach the end of a traffic jam on the freeway. Turn on the hazard light. Form an alley in the middle of the lane for the passage of police and helping vehicles: on roads with three lanes for one direction, form an alley between the left and middle lane. Therefore, you have to drive far to the right. This rule applies outside built-up areas and on freeways.
answerASource: - as far to the right as possible
answerBSource: - as far to the left as possible
answerCSource: - in the centre
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz avtomagistralda tirbandlik oxiriga yaqinlashyapsiz. Avariya chiroqlarini yoqing. Politsiya va yordam transportlari o‘tishi uchun favqulodda yo‘lak hosil qiling: bir yo‘nalishda uch yo‘lakli yo‘lda u chap va o‘rta yo‘lak orasida bo‘ladi. Shuning uchun imkon qadar o‘ngga yuring.

questionTextSource: What should you do?
explanationSource: They want to leave the freeway. You can see that traffic is stalling in your intended exit. Since you are not allowed to drive on the hard shoulder and wait on the lane, you behave correctly if you continue driving and use the next exit in order to exit the freeway.
answerASource: I continue driving
answerBSource: I get in line on the hard shoulder
answerCSource: I stop on my lane and wait for a gap
questionTextTarget: Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz avtomagistraldan chiqmoqchisiz, ammo chiqish yo‘lida tirbandlik bor. Yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida yurish va o‘z yo‘lagizda kutish mumkin emas. To‘g‘ri harakat — davom etish va keyingi chiqishdan foydalanish.

questionTextSource: What must you do when a traffic jam forms on this road?
explanationSource: Any car driver must cooperate in forming an alley in the middle of the road for the passage of police and support vehicles in case of congestion on freeways and on out-of-town roads with more than one lane. Do not drive on the side strip, this is prohibited.
answerASource: - drive as far to the left as possible
answerBSource: - drive as far to the right as possible
answerCSource: - continuing driving in the centre
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘lda tirbandlik yuzaga kelganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistrallarda va aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida bir yo‘nalishda bir nechta yo‘lakli yo‘llarda tirbandlik bo‘lsa, politsiya va yordam transportlari uchun yo‘l o‘rtasida favqulodda yo‘lak hosil qilishda hamma qatnashishi kerak. Yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan yurish taqiqlangan.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You meet a wrong-way driver on the freeway exit. By driving as far to the right as possible, you can best counteract a collision with the wrong-way driver. Now other road users must be warned of this acute danger. For this reason, you must inform the police.
answerASource: I warn the driver by sounding my horn and flashing my lights
answerBSource: I drive over to the right-side as far as possible
answerCSource: I notify the police
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Siz avtomagistral chiqishida qarama-qarshi yo‘nalishda kelayotgan haydovchiga duch kelyapsiz. To‘qnashuvdan qochish uchun imkon qadar o‘ngga yuring. Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ogohlantirish va politsiyaga xabar berish kerak.
answerATarget: Haydovchini signal va faralar bilan ogohlantiraman

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: They have already passed the truck on the acceleration lane on the right-hand side of the freeway. If you continue to accelerate, you can drive onto the main lane before the end of the lane. You should do that.
answerASource: I accelerate and merge in front of the [truck]
answerBSource: I slow down and merge between the [red car] and the [truck]
answerCSource: I slow down and merge after the [yellow vehicle]
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz tezlanish yo‘lagida yuk mashinasini o‘ng tomondan allaqachon o‘tdingiz. Tezlashishda davom etsangiz, yo‘lak tugashidan oldin asosiy yo‘lakka chiqishingiz mumkin. Shunday qiling.
answerBTarget: Sekinlashib, [qizil avtomobil] va [yuk mashinasi] orasiga qo‘shilaman

questionTextSource: You want to exit the motorway. What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: You flash and leave the freeway at the exit. The route to the turn of the exit is used to decelerate. Drive quickly off the highway, then reduce your pace. Drive into the corner at a moderately reduced speed.
answerASource: I move into the left-hand lane
answerBSource: I watch out for oncoming vehicles
answerCSource: I continue by driving on the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistraldan chiqmoqchisiz. Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Signal berib, chiqishdan avtomagistralni tark eting. Chiqish yo‘lining burilishigacha bo‘lgan qismi sekinlashish uchun xizmat qiladi. Avval avtomagistraldan tez chiqib oling, keyin tezlikni kamaytiring va burilishga mos kamaytirilgan tezlikda kiring.

questionTextSource: What must you do if you find yourself in a traffic jam on motorways and on highways with two lanes travelling in the same direction?
explanationSource: If vehicles stand or drive at walking speed on freeways or on roads outside of built-up areas with at least two lanes for one direction, the following applies: You, as a car driver, must participate in forming a free lane between the leftmost and rightmost lane for the passage of police and support vehicles.
answerASource: - drive as far to the right as possible in the right-hand lane
answerBSource: - drive as far to the left as possible in the left-hand lane
answerCSource: - drive as far to the left as possible in the right-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallarda va bir yo‘nalishda ikki yo‘lakli tezkor yo‘llarda tirbandlikka tushsangiz nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar avtomagistralda yoki aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida bir yo‘nalishda kamida ikki yo‘lakli yo‘lda transport to‘xtasa yoki piyoda tezligida yursa, politsiya va yordam transportlari uchun eng chap va o‘ng yo‘laklar orasida favqulodda yo‘lak hosil qilishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - o‘ng yo‘lakda imkon qadar o‘ngga yurish
answerBTarget: - chap yo‘lakda imkon qadar chapga yurish
answerCTarget: - o‘ng yo‘lakda imkon qadar chapga yurish

questionTextSource: You are approaching a traffic jam on the motorway. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: Warn following traffic by switching on the hazard warning lights and close up carefully.
answerASource: I pull carefully up behind the last car in the traffic jam
answerBSource: I drive carefully through the emergency corridor
answerCSource: I continue driving carefully along the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistralda tirbandlikka yaqinlashyapsiz. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Avariya chiroqlarini yoqib ortdagi transportni ogohlantiring va tirbandlik oxiriga ehtiyotkorlik bilan yaqinlashing.
answerATarget: Tirbandlikdagi oxirgi avtomobil ortiga ehtiyotkorlik bilan yaqinlashaman
answerCTarget: Yo‘l cheti yo‘lagi bo‘ylab ehtiyotkorlik bilan davom etaman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource:
You must stay in the middle lane because there are vehicles in the left and right lanes that you would obstruct.
In the right lane, a motorbike is coming onto the motorway from the slip road. In the left lane is the car that just overtook you.
answerASource: I stay in the middle lane
answerBSource: I move into the left-hand lane
answerCSource: I move into the right-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Chap va o‘ng yo‘laklarda siz xalaqit beradigan transport vositalari borligi sabab o‘rta yo‘lakda qolishingiz kerak. O‘ng yo‘lakda mototsikl kirish yo‘lidan avtomagistralga chiqmoqda. Chap yo‘lakda esa sizni hozirgina quvib o‘tgan avtomobil bor.

questionTextSource: You want to leave the motorway at the next exit. What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource:
When leaving the motorway, you should set the indicator at least 300 m before the exit.
Always keep a close eye on the traffic behind you when driving on the motorway. Especially when exiting the motorway, make sure that nobody tries to overtake you on the right.
answerASource: I observe the traffic behind me
answerBSource: I turn on my right-side indicators now
answerCSource: I begin now to smoothly brake down to 60 km/h
questionTextTarget: Keyingi chiqishda avtomagistraldan chiqmoqchisiz. Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistraldan chiqishda chiqishdan kamida 300 m oldin burilish ko‘rsatkichini yoqing. Avtomagistralda ortdagi harakatni doimo diqqat bilan kuzating. Ayniqsa chiqishda sizni o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tishga urinayotgan hech kim yo‘qligiga ishonch hosil qiling.
answerCTarget: Hozirdan sekin va silliq 60 km/soatgacha tormozlayman

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: Reduce your speed and allow the blue car to join the motorway while keeping a safe distance.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I accelerate
answerCSource: I move into the middle lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tezlikni kamaytiring va xavfsiz masofani saqlagan holda ko‘k avtomobilga avtomagistralga qo‘shilish imkonini bering.

questionTextSource: What can you expect now?
explanationSource:
You should expect the truck in front of you to slow down because the other truck in the right lane is already slowing down and has its hazard lights on. You also have to expect that the truck will stay in the middle lane because it doesn't have enough space to get into the right lane. 
If a dangerous situation is identified on the motorway, the hazard warning lights may be switched on in order to warn all following vehicles in good time. Dangerous situations usually include accidents, traffic jams or slow traffic.
answerASource: - brake
answerBSource: - stay in the middle lane
answerCSource: - accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir nimani kutishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi yuk mashinasi sekinlashishini kutishingiz kerak, chunki o‘ng yo‘lakdagi boshqa yuk mashinasi allaqachon sekinlashmoqda va avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan. Shuningdek, yuk mashinasi o‘ng yo‘lakka o‘tish uchun yetarli joy topmagani sabab o‘rta yo‘lakda qolishini ham kuting. Avtomagistralda xavfli vaziyat aniqlansa, ortdagi transportni vaqtida ogohlantirish uchun avariya chiroqlari yoqilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Your vehicle has broken down on the autobahn. What must you remember when having it towed away?
explanationSource: When towing on the freeway, the towing vehicle and the towed vehicle must have their hazard lights switched on. It's only allowed to tow on the freeway until the next exit. Then, the freeway must be left.
answerASource: You must leave the autobahn at the next exit
answerBSource: During towing, both vehicles must have their hazard warning lights switched on
answerCSource: You may continue along the autobahn to the exit nearest a suitable garage
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz avtomagistralda buzilib qoldi. Uni shatakka oldirishda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda shatakka olishda tortayotgan va tortilayotgan transport vositalarining avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan bo‘lishi kerak. Avtomagistralda faqat keyingi chiqishgacha shatakka olishga ruxsat beriladi, keyin avtomagistralni tark etish kerak.
answerBTarget: Shatakka olish paytida ikkala transport vositasida ham avariya chiroqlari yoqilgan bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: Mos ustaxonaga eng yaqin chiqishgacha avtomagistralda davom etish mumkin

questionTextSource: What applies on autobahns?
explanationSource: On the freeway you are only allowed to drive forward and only in one given direction. Reversing, turning and stopping is strictly prohibited on the roadway as well as on the side strip.
answerASource: No stopping on the roadway and hard shoulder
answerBSource: No reversing
answerCSource: In darkness, under no circumstances drive faster than the range of visibility allowed by dipped headlights
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallarda nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda faqat oldinga va belgilangan yo‘nalishda yurish mumkin. Qatnov qismida ham, yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida ham orqaga yurish, qayrilib burilish va to‘xtash qat’iyan taqiqlangan.
answerATarget: Qatnov qismida va yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtash taqiqlangan
answerCTarget: Qorong‘ida hech qanday holatda qisqa faralar ko‘rsatadigan masofadan tez yurmaslik kerak

questionTextSource: You are driving on the motorway and have missed the exit. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: Continue until the next exit and leave the freeway there. Now you can drive back to the missed exit on the other side of the freeway. You must not stop or drive backwards.
answerASource: I continue driving and leave the motorway at one of the next exits
answerBSource: I reverse back on the hard shoulder, because the exit is less than 100 m behind me
answerCSource: I stop on the hard shoulder to plan my subsequent route
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistralda ketyapsiz va chiqishni o‘tkazib yubordingiz. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Keyingi chiqishgacha davom eting va u yerda avtomagistraldan chiqing. Keyin boshqa tomondan qaytib kelishingiz mumkin. To‘xtash yoki orqaga yurish mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Haydashda davom etaman va keyingi chiqishlardan birida avtomagistraldan chiqaman
answerBTarget: Chiqish 100 m dan kam ortda qolgani uchun yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida orqaga yuraman
answerCTarget: Keyingi yo‘nalishni rejalash uchun yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtayman

questionTextSource: How can lane changing assist help you in this situation without steering override?
explanationSource: Lane Change Assist recognises the vehicle in the middle lane as a hazard and warns you not to change to that lane. To change lanes on your own would require steering intervention. Lane Change Assist does not interfere with your speed.
answerASource: - warns of a possible collision with a vehicle in the middle lane
answerBSource: - performs a lane change independently
answerCSource: - brakes the speed of my vehicle
questionTextTarget: Rul boshqaruviga aralashmaydigan yo‘lak almashtirish yordamchisi bu vaziyatda qanday yordam berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lak almashtirish yordamchisi o‘rta yo‘lakdagi transport vositasini xavf sifatida tanib, bu yo‘lakka o‘tmaslik haqida ogohlantiradi. Mustaqil yo‘lak almashtirish rul boshqaruviga aralashishni talab qiladi. Bu tizim tezlikka aralashmaydi.
answerATarget: - o‘rta yo‘lakdagi transport vositasi bilan mumkin bo‘lgan to‘qnashuv haqida ogohlantiradi

questionTextSource: What is prohibited when using motorways?
explanationSource:
According to the StVO § 18 motorways and motor drivers:
(7) Turning and reversing are prohibited.
(8) hold, also on the side stripes, is forbidden.
answerASource: Stopping on the hard shoulder
answerBSource: Reversing
answerCSource: Performing U-turns
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallardan foydalanishda nima taqiqlangan?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l harakati qoidalariga ko‘ra avtomagistrallarda qayrilib burilish va orqaga yurish taqiqlangan. To‘xtash, jumladan yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida ham, taqiqlangan.

questionTextSource: What vehicles are subject to the toll on motorways and certain federal highways?
explanationSource: is correct: motor vehicles with at least 7.5 t permissible total mass, which are intended solely for the carriage of goods. Combinations of vehicles with at least 7.5 t permissible total mass.
answerASource: Motor vehicles with a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t, intended exclusively for the carriage of goods by road
answerBSource: Combination vehicles with a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t, intended exclusively for the carriage of goods by road
answerCSource: Buses with a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallar va ayrim federal yo‘llarda qaysi transport vositalari toll to‘loviga tortiladi?
explanationTarget: Faqat yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan, ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi kamida 7,5 t bo‘lgan motorli transport vositalari va shunday transport birikmalari toll to‘loviga tortiladi.
answerATarget: Ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irligi kamida 7,5 t bo‘lgan va faqat yo‘l orqali yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan motorli transport vositalari
answerBTarget: Ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irligi kamida 7,5 t bo‘lgan va faqat yo‘l orqali yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan transport birikmalari
answerCTarget: Ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irligi kamida 7,5 t bo‘lgan avtobuslar

questionTextSource: Who can be held responsible if the toll charge is not paid?
explanationSource: Not only the driver but also the holder are responsible. The shipper is not responsible.
answerASource: The driver
answerBSource: The holder
answerCSource: The shipping agent
questionTextTarget: Toll to‘lovi to‘lanmasa, kim javobgar bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Toll to‘lovi uchun nafaqat haydovchi, balki transport vositasi egasi ham javobgar. Jo‘natuvchi javobgar emas.

questionTextSource: The gross vehicle weight rating of your towing vehicle amounts to 6.5 t; the gross vehicle weight rating of your trailer is 5.5 t. Is this combination vehicle liable to the toll if used on a motorway?
explanationSource: If your tractor t a maximum authorized mass of 6.5 and your trailer has 5.5 t, you may distribute the highway only sail if you entrichtest the toll for your vehicle combination is intended exclusively for freight. These are Toll Roads.
answerASource: Yes, if the combination vehicle is intended exclusively for the carriage of goods by road
answerBSource: Always, because the combination vehicle exceeds the gross combination weight rating of 7.5 t
answerCSource: No, because the towing vehicle does not exceed the gross vehicle weight rating of 7.5 t
questionTextTarget: Tortuvchi transport vositangizning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi 6,5 t, tirkamangizniki 5,5 t. Bu transport birikmasi avtomagistralda ishlatilsa toll to‘loviga tortiladimi?
explanationTarget: Agar transport birikmangiz faqat yo‘l orqali yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan bo‘lsa, ruxsat etilgan umumiy massa 7,5 t dan oshgani sabab avtomagistralda toll to‘lovi to‘lanadi.
answerATarget: Ha, agar transport birikmasi faqat yo‘l orqali yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan bo‘lsa
answerBTarget: Har doim, chunki transport birikmasining umumiy og‘irligi 7,5 t dan oshadi
answerCTarget: Yo‘q, chunki tortuvchi transport vositasining umumiy og‘irligi 7,5 t dan oshmaydi

questionTextSource: The gross vehicle weight rating of your truck amounts to 5.5 t; the gross vehicle weight rating of your trailer is 2.0 t. Is this combination vehicle liable to the toll if used for road haulage on a motorway?
explanationSource: Since your total mass of a total of 7.5 is your truck (freight) t, including trailer (vehicle combination) is payable on the highway a toll.
answerASource: Yes
answerBSource: No
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinangizning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi 5,5 t, tirkamangizniki 2,0 t. Bu transport birikmasi avtomagistralda yuk tashishda ishlatilsa toll to‘loviga tortiladimi?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama birikmasining umumiy massasi 7,5 t bo‘lgani uchun avtomagistralda yuk tashishda toll to‘lovi to‘lanadi.

questionTextSource: Your truck has a gross vehicle weight rating of 6.5 t, and you would like to use it on the motorway for road haulage. What is true regarding the toll terminal registration?
explanationSource: Your trucks with a gross vehicle weight of 6.5 t for freight has no log-on to make, since the total mass is less than 7.5 t.
answerASource: - do not have to register
answerBSource: - have to enter the number of axles
answerCSource: - have to enter the pollutant class (emissions class)
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinangizning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi 6,5 t va siz uni avtomagistralda yuk tashish uchun ishlatmoqchisiz. Toll terminalida ro‘yxatdan o‘tish bo‘yicha nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi 6,5 t bo‘lgan yuk mashinasi yuk tashishda 7,5 t dan kam bo‘lgani uchun ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazilishi shart emas.

questionTextSource: Your truck is equipped with an on-board unit (OBU). What information must be reviewed, and adapted as necessary, prior to travelling on a toll route?
explanationSource: Before you befährst a Toll route your OBU (toll collection device), you should enter the number of axles and adapt if necessary.
answerASource: The number of axles
answerBSource: The emissions class
answerCSource: The gross vehicle weight rating
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinangiz OBU bort qurilmasi bilan jihozlangan. Toll yo‘liga chiqishdan oldin qaysi ma’lumot tekshirilishi va zarur bo‘lsa moslashtirilishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Toll yo‘liga chiqishdan oldin OBU qurilmasida o‘qlar sonini tekshirib, zarur bo‘lsa moslashtirish kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to drive a toll-chargeable motor vehicle on the motorway. How can the requisite toll entry be performed?
explanationSource: 3 answers are right here. With a toll station terminal in the www and also by means of on-board unit, short (OBU) so manually and digitally.
answerASource: - via the internet
answerBSource: - at a toll terminal
answerCSource: - using the on-board unit (OBU)
questionTextTarget: Toll to‘loviga tortiladigan motorli transport vositasida avtomagistralda yurmoqchisiz. Zarur toll ro‘yxati qanday amalga oshirilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Toll ro‘yxati internet orqali, toll terminalida yoki bort qurilmasi OBU orqali amalga oshirilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Why should you have the traffic information switched on, when driving on the motorway?
explanationSource: Drivers are not required to listen to traffic news, but traffic news are indispensable for a smooth journey. Traffic news inform about traffic jams, traffic accidents and construction sites. Warnings about wrong-way drivers have already prevented a lot of serious accidents.
answerASource: - gives warnings about motorists heading in the wrong direction
answerBSource: - provides reports about traffic jams
